@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "open-webui-3620-enh-issue-performance-optimisation",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "open-webui: enh/issue: performance optimisation",
+    "description": "enh/issue: performance optimisation. Requested by 14+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current open-webui deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your open-webui version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui\nhelm list -n open-webui 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working open-webui installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review open-webui configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant open-webui configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui\nkubectl get configmap -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-webui\n```\nThe performance of long chat threads is really bad. I don't know if it is a browser client side issue or an issue on the server side."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for enh/issue: performance optimisation",
+        "description": ">  This seems to not be an issue with Chromium -- I was able to continue that chat with fast responses for a couple of days, and then... a different issue with long chats on Chromium:\n> \n> ```js\n> Uncaught (in promise) RangeError: Maximum call stack size exceeded\n>     at Ze (Chat.svelte:604:30)\n>     at Ze (Chat.svelte:611:15)\n>     at Ze (Chat.svelte:611:15)\n>     at Ze (Chat.svelte:611:15)\n>     at Ze (Chat.svelte:611:15)\n>     at Ze (Chat.svelte:611:15)\n>     at Ze (Chat.svelte:611:15)\n>   \n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui\nkubectl get events -n open-webui --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"enh/issue: performance optimisation\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": ">  This seems to not be an issue with Chromium -- I was able to continue that chat with fast responses for a couple of days, and then...",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
